productDisplayName: New Balance Women Grey Sports Shoes
description: The new balance 310 is a lightweight racing comp which offers medial support and ABZORB cushioning suitable for marathon distances. This shoe features a lightweight plastic 10-lugged plate suitable for both, indoor and outdoor track. Upper Heavily meshed synthetic upper for maximum breathability Inner bootie to wrap around the foot and offer maximum comfort Synthetic overlays for structural support Branding overlay on either side for style and midfoot support Heavily meshed and padded tongue, and padded collar for snug, comfort Fit Lace-up system for snug, customised fit Perforated toe box foxing and side overlays for enhanced durability and ventilation Midsole IMEVA midsole cushioning Cushioned footbed for in-step all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Durable rubber outsole with flex grooves in the forefoot for maximum flexibility Waffle pattern lugs on lateral forefoot and rectangular grooved lugs in medial forefoot for maximum grip and traction Trusstic band on midfoot for inner arch support Decoupled heel for maximum grip and durability Reinforced toe guard onto the upper for easier toe-off and better protection to the forefoot Shoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
